overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a high-speed nighttime drive through a dense neon-lit futuristic metropolis. The player navigates through towering urban canyons lined with holographic billboards, executes a right turn at a busy intersection, and transitions into a covered plaza area with distinct neon installations.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense commercial canyon with elevated walkways and neon signage

agents.ego_description: driving straight through the neon-lit city street at high speed, passing under overhead walkways

entered.detail: elevated pedestrian walkway with glass railings and green neon lighting underneath
large illuminated billboard featuring anime-style character advertising purple beverage
bright red neon sign reading FOOD CAFE on the right side building
elevated highway or walkway crossing overhead with structural supports
tall building with prominent cyan softsys signage visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-speed drive through a narrow cyberpunk city canyon. Elevated walkways with green neon underlighting line the left side while a prominent red FOOD CAFE sign glows on the right. The camera moves steadily forward toward a distant softsys building, passing under massive overpass structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street approaching major intersection with heavy neon advertising

events.description: begins slowing down as the vehicle approaches the intersection with the softsys building

agents.ego_description: continuing straight toward the intersection while reducing speed, navigating between other vehicles

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving parallel on the right side, maintaining steady speed

entered.detail: high-rise building with illuminated windows and vertical neon strips on the right side

segments.scene_description: The vehicle continues through the urban canyon, now with the softsys building looming larger ahead. The covered walkway recedes to the left mid-ground while traffic density increases slightly. The food cafe and anime billboard pass out of view as the camera approaches the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: initiates a right turn at the intersection, steering onto the crosswalk
crosses the yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk while other vehicles pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: executing a right turn at the intersection and driving across the pedestrian crosswalk, navigating around crossing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket and dark pants crossing the street from right to left

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing marked with thick yellow parallel lines
concrete building wall covered in colorful graffiti art including a red bull design
large overhead neon installation glowing bright green in the distance

segments.scene_description: The vehicle slows and executes a right turn at the intersection, crossing the prominent yellow-striped crosswalk. Pedestrians are visible crossing the street, and the softsys building shifts to the left background. A new area with a large green neon structure becomes visible ahead while graffiti-covered walls line the left side.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian plaza with modern architecture and neon installations

events.description: enters the covered plaza area beneath the large green neon structure, transitioning from open intersection to sheltered walkway

agents.ego_description: driving through the pedestrian plaza area, passing under the green neon structure and navigating around pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person carrying a large box walking across the plaza from right to left

entered.detail: contemporary building with dark facade and horizontal green-lit windows
decorative tree with pink foliage illuminated by ambient neon light
open paved area with railings and elevated walkways

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a more open plaza area beneath a massive green neon overhead structure. The environment shifts from dense commercial canyon to a modern pedestrian plaza with a distinctive pink tree and contemporary office buildings. The camera continues forward through this sheltered space with scattered pedestrians visible.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a high-speed drive through a dense, neon-lit urban canyon that eventually opens into a sheltered modern plaza. It begins by racing forward past green-lit elevated walkways and a glowing red food cafe sign, moving steadily toward a distant softsys building beneath massive overpass structures. As the vehicle continues, the commercial billboards recede and traffic density increases, leading the camera directly toward a busy intersection. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows to execute a right turn across a yellow-striped crosswalk, leaving the softsys building behind and passing graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the environment expands as the camera enters a pedestrian plaza beneath a massive green neon overhead structure, gliding past a distinctive pink tree and contemporary office buildings.
